Name: Add Two Items To Cart
Description: Add backpack and bike light — cart must have 2 items.

Name: Products Page Loads After Login
Description: Products page title must say "Products" after login.

Name: Wrong Password Shows Error
Description: Wrong password must show an error message.

Name: Add One Item To Cart
Description: Add backpack — cart must have 1 item.

Name: Sort Products Low To High
Description: Sort by price low-to-high — first item must be Sauce Labs Onesie ($7.99).

Name: Cart Page Shows Added Items
Description: Items added must appear on the cart page.

Name: Locked Out User Cannot Login
Description: Locked user must see an error, not get in.

Name: Valid Login Shows Products Page
Description: Standard user logs in — products page must appear.

Name: Sort Products A To Z
Description: Default sort A-Z — first item must be Sauce Labs Backpack.

Name: Complete Checkout Flow
Description: Add item, checkout, finish — order must complete.

Name: Remove Item From Cart
Description: Add backpack, remove from cart — cart must be empty.

Name: Sort Products High To Low
Description: Sort by price high-to-low — first item must be Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket.
